summary: Iteration 36 - Account Settings ERP Module fully tested. All 32 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Setting Akun ERP page with 12 tabs working correctly. Account Derivation Engine integrated with Sales Module.

ACCOUNT_SETTINGS_API_TESTS.test_get_all_account_settings: PASS - GET /api/account-settings/ returns settings grouped by tab

SALES_MODULE_INTEGRATION.test_sales_invoice_with_account_derivati: PASS - Sales invoice creates journal entries using Account Derivation Engine

FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.login_and_business_selection: PASS - Multi-tenant login with OCB GROUP selection
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.12_tabs_visibility: PASS - All 12 tabs visible (Data Item, Pembelian, Penjualan 1, Penjualan 2, Konsinyasi, Hutang Piutang, Lain-lain, Cabang, Gudang, Kategori, Payment Method, Pajak)
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.tab_navigation: PASS - Tab clicks work for all tabs
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.account_derivation_priority_banner: PASS - Shows: Cabang → Gudang → Kategori → Payment Method → Global Setting
FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.tax_mapping_data: PASS - Shows existing PPN mapping (2-1400 PPN Keluaran)

account_settings_crud.list_all: Working - GET /api/account-settings/ returns grouped by tab
account_settings_crud.get_by_tab: Working - All 7 global tabs (data_item, pembelian, penjualan_1, penjualan_2, konsinyasi, hutang_piutang, lain_lain)
account_settings_crud.initialize_defaults: Working - Bulk initialize default account settings

account_derivation_engine.priority_order: Branch > Warehouse > Category > Payment > Tax > Global > Default
account_derivation_engine.global_fallback: Working - Falls back to global settings if no specific mapping
account_derivation_engine.default_fallback: Working - Falls back to DEFAULT_ACCOUNTS if no global setting

sales_module_integration.invoice_journal_creation: Working - Sales invoice creates journal entries using derived accounts

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_account_settings_iteration36.py - New comprehensive test file for Account Settings module

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and tab interactions working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Account Settings ERP module (iPOS style) fully implemented and tested. 12 tabs implemented: Data Item, Pembelian, Penjualan 1, Penjualan 2, Konsinyasi, Hutang Piutang, Lain-lain, Cabang, Gudang, Kategori, Payment Method, Pajak. Account Derivation Engine with priority: Branch > Warehouse > Category > Payment > Tax > Global > Default. Fiscal Period System with overlap validation. Sales Module integration verified - invoices create journal entries using derived accounts. Frontend page at /master/setting-akun with full UI functionality.
